---
name: Feature Suggestion or Bug Report
about: Provide architecture feedback or report an issue with the simulation engine.
title: '[FEEDBACK] '
labels: enhancement, discussion
assignees: ''
---

### Type of Feedback
- [ ] Core C++ Engine Optimization
- [ ] Web Components / TypeScript UI Layout
- [ ] Bug / Simulation Mismatch
- [ ] General Architecture Question

### Description
Please describe your feedback, suggestion, or the bug you encountered.

### Suggested Solution (Optional)
If you have an idea on how to improve this (e.g., modern C++ patterns, alternate hashing methods), feel free to sketch it out here!
